raw_input:
[5.0/5] Love this. This stuff works great. I am very fair (freckles and all) and this gives me a glow that makes me look tons better (in my mind) with out making me look too dark or orangey. Also the smell doesn't bother me at all like it has with other self tanners. I have been using it for over month and only had one minor streak. [5.0/5] Five Stars Great [3.0/5] Only for Prissy Women This is a pretty great product. The tan looks nice and natural, no matter how thick you lather it on. And it's a great moisturizer too. Some people complained about the smell, but I honestly didn't notice anything different from a regular daily moisturizer. The shimmer is a nice touch. It really looks great.

HOWEVER, and this is a big however, if you manage to get wet while wearing clothes (even just a bathing suit) it'll rub off. I went to an amusement, rode maybe 4 water-based rides, and by the end of the day the spots that were hit by my clothes were my original skin color. AND it doesn't even come off evenly. It comes off splotchy, so it looks like you have some sort of skin disorder. Sweat will do it too. So don't intend on spending time in the heat, especially if you insist on doing so with clothes on. The same issue can be achieved after a shower or bath if you rub your skin too roughly with the towel. Basically, you have to baby the tan like nobody's business because if you don't, you'll find it rubbing off in some spots. Pale isn't half as bad as being spotted. [5.0/5] Smells bad but works well! I'm a pale redhead. I burn many times before ever starting to color. 2 days into using this product, I already have an even, natural looking sun-kissed glow! Waiting on the face version to arrive! It doesn't smell very pleasant though. My husband said I smell like tea... [5.0/5] The best for fair skin I love this Loreal daily moisturizer, the color it gives is so natural, never too dark, streaky, or orange. I quit seeing it in the local stores a few years ago, so have only bought from amazon. I've tried so many others and have never been satisfied. This is a great product! [5.0/5] No orange ever. This is the only bronzer that looks like a real tan. I was able to get the fair skin edition from Amazon for which I'm grateful. As a fair skin blonde I think it's better for me. I've tried others, more expensive, this works really well. [[ASIN:B000NPVD7Q L'Oreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer, Fair Skin Tones 8 fl oz (236 ml)]] [5.0/5] Great product This is the best self-tan product I have used. It leaves a natural looking brown tint, no orange tint. I leaves my skin feeling soft and moisturized. It also works very fast, nice looking tan after 3-4 hours. I would recommend this product to anyone. [4.0/5] sublime glow. This is the first tan in a bottle product I have ever used. My birthday is coming up in June and I wanted to get some colour while avoiding the tanning salons and blistering Texas heat. Ive been using this lotion for about two weeks now and can see a slight change in my colour tone. I am very fair skinned so I figured I would see more of a dramatic change. This stuff works great as a moisturizer. On days I know I'm not going out and il just lounge around the house I apply a very small amount of lotion. Opposite days I pile it on and have a super amazing glow. Only downside is I look like a sparkling bead that belongs atop a prom dress. My boyfriend said I looked like Edward cullens wife. Haha. Other than that I really love this stuff and will more than likely be purchasing again. [4.0/5] Definitely better than old-school sunless tanners MY Positives: No streaks or unsightly orange-y spots, noticeable color after 1 use, smell (like peach tea) is less-bad than old-school tanners, and I only need to use it every 2-4 days to maintain color (can't imagine daily use).

MY Negatives: Smell is there and stays and stays (and stays on clothes), damp and heavy feel on skin (like never soaks in - I prefer lighter, barely-there moisturizer), at end of day I can wipe yellow-orange off skin with a damp washcloth.

I'll stick with this until the next-gen of sunless tanners comes out. I guess doing away with the smell is hard for manufacturers - after 8 hours I really get tired of smelling it! [5.0/5] MOISTURIZER I AM FAIR SKINNED AND THIS PRODUCT DOES NOT TURN YELLOW. WOULDN'T BE WITHOUT IT [5.0/5] Excellent self tanner This product doesn't have that horrible smell most self tanners have. I have really pale skin, after using it every day for 5 days, my skin has a healthy tint that looks natural. Overall I am really pleased with this product and would recommend it to my friends [5.0/5] Great! I am so glad to get this product in the fair skin tones. I can't find it in ay of the stores around here. It blends well with my skin and I love the way it goes on and stays on. [5.0/5] Finally, some natural color! I'm pasty pale with freckles and will burn if I try to "tan." Plus, I don't care for the cancer risk. I've tried sunless tanners in the past and turned orange. I don't want to go to the spa for a spray tan because it's expensive.

I don't need a tan, just some color to keep from being so pasty. LOreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer Fair Skin Tones worked great for me. I had a hint of tan color within a day, nice and even, and it got a little better each day. It didn't look weird on my fair skin. It was nice and subtle, without taking forever to emerge. The micro pearl flecks also gave me a nice immediate glow. By the way, on my face, I used LOreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer Face for Fair Skin, which did not have the pearl flecks, but did have SPF 15. It doesn't give as much color, but that is okay because I wear makeup anyway.

Some people complain about the smell, but I think it depends on taste. I've seen in other reviews that it smells like tea, and it does a little. My husband doesn't even know what I'm putting on, but last night in bed, he commented that I smelled so good, and he kept sniffing me because he liked it better than those floral or fruity lotions. He had never complimented my lotion scent before!

It is great as a moisturizer, too, my dry skin feels nice and hydrated all day. It's a bonus that it is giving me a little color, too.

I give it five stars! [5.0/5] Finally, some natural color! I'm pasty pale with freckles and will burn if I try to "tan." Plus, I don't care for the cancer risk. I've tried sunless tanners in the past and turned orange. I don't want to go to the spa for a spray tan because it's expensive.

I don't need a tan, just some color to keep from being so pasty. LOreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer Fair Skin Tones worked great for me. I had a hint of tan color within a day, nice and even, and it got a little better each day. It didn't look weird on my fair skin. It was nice and subtle, without taking forever to emerge. The micro pearl flecks also gave me a nice immediate glow. By the way, on my face, I used LOreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer Face for Fair Skin, which did not have the pearl flecks, but did have SPF 15. It doesn't give as much color, but that is okay because I wear makeup anyway.

Some people complain about the smell, but I think it depends on taste. I've seen in other reviews that it smells like tea, and it does a little. My husband doesn't even know what I'm putting on, but last night in bed, he commented that I smelled so good, and he kept sniffing me because he liked it better than those floral or fruity lotions. He had never complimented my lotion scent before!

It is great as a moisturizer, too, my dry skin feels nice and hydrated all day. It's a bonus that it is giving me a little color, too.

I give it five stars! [5.0/5] awesome i am super fair complected (the lightest shade or second lightest shade available of any foundation or concealer ive worn, just to help illustrate). i have gotten several compliments on my complection since i started using this. I was worried any self tanner at all could make me look really weird but its super natural looking, It makes my dull pale skin look more alive. I love it. [5.0/5] Why is this no longer in stores? This is far and away the best sunless tanning product on yhe market--why is it not in leading retailers any more?!!!! [3.0/5] Gives a light tan to skin I like this lotion because it gives a subtle tan to skin, but I do not the shimmer it leaves behind on my skin. [1.0/5] Didn't work for me. I've been using this for about two weeks and haven't noticed any change in my skin tone. I like the glow and the smell isn't bad, but my boyfriend even said my legs looked whiter after a few days use. I'll be trying another brand instead. [5.0/5] best product for redheads that I have found I have tried them ALL and have a closet filled with half used bottles of tanner ranging in price from $5 to $30 and I have to say, this gives me the best color and the best coverage. Most people have yellow undertones to their skin which works well with self tanners, but I have very fair skin with pink undertones and most of them come out orange and uneven which is very obvious on my fair skin. I am sooooo impressed with the light brown color - it looks very natural, sunkissed, and glowy. I just stocked up!
Also, I think it smelled nice - kind of like a light grapefruit scent. I'm not sure what offended the other reviewer unless she dislikes the smell of citrus or the way the product reacts to her body chemistry. Most of them smell bad when they react to the bacteria on your skin's surface, but that washes off in the shower in the morning when you wash with a good antibacterial soap (I use Dial).

I can't find it in ay of the stores around here. It blends well with my skin and I love the way it goes on and stays on. [5.0/5] Finally, some natural color! I'm pasty pale with freckles and will burn if I try to "tan." Plus, I don't care for the cancer risk. I've tried sunless tanners in the past and turned orange. I don't want to go to the spa for a spray tan because it's expensive.

I don't need a tan, just some color to keep from being so pasty. LOreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer Fair Skin Tones worked great for me. I had a hint of tan color within a day, nice and even, and it got a little better each day. It didn't look weird on my fair skin. It was nice and subtle, without taking forever to emerge. The micro pearl flecks also gave me a nice immediate glow. By the way, on my face, I used LOreal Sunless Sublime Glow Daily Moisturizer Face for Fair Skin, which did not have the pearl flecks, but did have SPF 15. It doesn't give as much color, but that is okay because I wear makeup anyway.

Some people complain about the smell, but I think it depends on taste. I've seen in other reviews that it smells like tea, and it does a little. My husband doesn't even know what I'm putting on, but last night in bed, he commented that I smelled so good, and he kept sniffing me because he liked it better than those floral or fruity lotions. He had never complimented my lotion scent before!

It is great as a moisturizer, too, my dry skin feels nice and hydrated all day. It's a bonus that it is giving me a little color, too.

response:
Most reviewers love product. Works great for fair, pale, freckled skin. Gives natural-looking, subtle tan. No orange, no streaks. Good moisturizer too. Smell described as tea or grapefruit - some bothered, most not. Micro pearl shimmer gives immediate glow, though one reviewer found shimmer too much. Color builds over several days. Hard to find in stores, many buy from Amazon.

Main complaints: rubs off when wet or sweaty, comes off splotchy not even. One reviewer saw no color change at all. Another found product heavy, never fully soaks in, wipes off yellow-orange at end of day. Smell lingers on clothes.

Best for very fair skin. Multiple reviewers specifically pale redheads or freckled blondes report great results. Face version also available with SPF 15 but less color.
